source_pr.title: *: refine code for StmtTxn
source_pr.body:
* If `StmtCommit()` meets error, mark it, rollback the whole transaction later.
* provide `StmtTxn.Valid()` to replace `s.Transaction == nil || !s.Transaction.Valid()`
* merge `txnFuture` into `StmtTxn` and use `changeXXX` to maintain inner state.

@coocood  @winkyao  @jackysp @wentaoxu
